name: ThomasV
cooked:
Indeed, the UTXO commitment needs to be sent after funding_signed. Conceptually, the UTXO commitment is a temporary replacement for the funding transaction. I will amend the paper and upload a new version. Thanks for pointing this out!

Edit: new version uploaded. Old versions are available in the gist history. LSP Fraud Proofs · GitHub
topic_title: [Proposal] Public Fraud Proofs for Just-in-Time Channels
topic_html_title: [Proposal] Public Fraud Proofs for Just-in-Time Channels
raw:
Indeed, the UTXO commitment needs to be sent after `funding_signed`. Conceptually, the UTXO commitment is a temporary replacement for the funding transaction. I will amend the paper and upload a new version. Thanks for pointing this out!

Edit: new version uploaded. Old versions are available in the gist history. https://gist.github.com/ecdsa/dfa2d76a5fe845fd283c01b5ed12d274/
